services.title: Design, build, and renovation in one quiet premium story.
services.description: We create strong visual connections between landscape and architecture using geometry, contrast, and refined material direction.

items.title: Design
items.body: From concept direction to zoning, planting, and material language, the design process is clear, modern, and visually disciplined.

items.title: Renovation

items.title: Discovery & vision
items.body: We listen carefully, review the site context, and define the atmosphere, goals, and practical needs of the outdoor space.

items.body: We translate strategy into visual concepts, material directions, zoning, planting intent, and buildable technical decisions.

items.title: Build & site delivery
items.body: Execution is coordinated with quality control, clear communication, and a premium finish across hardscape, planting, and lighting.

items.title: Refresh & long-term value

about.title: A landscape studio shaped around modern restraint and premium execution
about.description: This React version keeps the visual calm, monochrome elegance, and premium storytelling expected from a luxury landscape and pool studio.
about.story: Our studio approach is rooted in visual simplicity, smart planning, and outdoor experiences that feel natural to live in. Whether a client needs a complete build or a considered renovation, we focus on creating atmosphere, clarity, and long-term value.
about.valuesTitle: Design values that guide every decision
about.valuesDescription: We care about elegance, clarity, and a result that still feels good months and years after handover.

values.title: Elegant clarity
values.body: Layouts, materials, and planting are selected to create calm confidence rather than visual noise.

values.title: Buildable intelligence
values.body: Ideas are developed with execution in mind, so the finished result stays true to the concept.

values.title: Lasting value
values.body: We design for real life, with practical movement, durable choices, and spaces that age gracefully.

about.missionTitle: Elevating the standards of outdoor living
about.missionDescription: To provide a seamless design-and-build experience that transforms outdoor environments into high-value architectural statements.
about.visionTitle: Defining the future of luxury landscape
about.visionDescription: To be the most trusted boutique studio for clients seeking modern restraint, technical precision, and an enduring outdoor lifestyle.

contact.title: Tell us about your site, your style, and your project ambition
contact.description: Whether you need a new landscape, a full build package, or a renovation strategy, we’d love to hear about it.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.description: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using our services.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: Welcome to MDO Landscape. By accessing our website and using our services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions.

sections.title: Scope of Services
sections.content: MDO Landscape provides luxury landscape design, build, and renovation services. The specific scope of work for each project will be defined in a separate written agreement.

sections.title: Quotes and Pricing
sections.content: All quotes provided are valid for 30 days. Prices are subject to change based on modifications to the project scope or material costs.

sections.title: Project Timelines
sections.content: Estimated timelines are provided in good faith but are subject to change due to weather conditions, material availability, or other unforeseen factors.

sections.title: Client Responsibilities
sections.content: Clients must provide accurate site information, access to the property, and timely feedback on design proposals to ensure project progress.

sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.content: Payment schedules are typically divided into stages: deposit, design phase, mobilization, and progress payments based on milestones.

sections.title: Changes and Revisions
sections.content: Any changes to the agreed scope of work must be documented in writing and may result in adjustments to the project timeline and cost.

sections.title: Liability Limitations
sections.content: MDO Landscape is not liable for indirect or consequential damages. Our total liability is limited to the value of the specific project agreement.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All designs, drawings, and visual materials produced by MDO Landscape remain the intellectual property of the studio unless otherwise agreed in writing.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Dubai.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.content: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at hello@mdolandscape.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: MDO Landscape is committed to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how we handle it.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide through our contact forms, such as your name, email address, phone number, and project details.

sections.title: How We Use Data
sections.content: We use your data to respond to inquiries, provide personalized project proposals, and improve our website experience.

sections.title: Cookies & Analytics
sections.content: We use cookies to analyze website traffic and user behavior to better understand our audience and optimize our content.

sections.title: Data Sharing Policy
sections.content: We do not sell or lease your personal information to third parties. Data is only shared with trusted partners involved in project delivery.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

sections.title: User Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data at any time.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to other sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those external websites.

sections.title: Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions about our privacy policy, please reach out to us at privacy@mdolandscape.com.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our landscape services.

items.question: What services do you provide?
items.answer: We provide a complete turnkey solution including luxury landscape design, high-end construction, pool building, outdoor lighting, and garden renovations.

items.question: Do you handle both design and execution?
items.answer: Yes, we are a design-and-build studio. We take care of every step from the initial concept and technical drawings to final site delivery.

items.question: Can I request a custom quote?
items.answer: Absolutely. Every project is unique. After an initial consultation and site visit, we provide a detailed, customized proposal based on your specific requirements.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Project timelines vary depending on complexity. A design phase usually takes 2-4 weeks, while construction can range from 8 to 16 weeks or more for larger estates.

items.question: Do you work on renovations?
items.answer: Yes, we specialize in refreshing aging landscapes, upgrading materials, and improving the flow and identity of existing outdoor spaces.

items.question: Do you provide pool and outdoor design?
items.answer: Yes, luxury pools and water features are a core part of our design language. We ensure they integrate seamlessly with the surrounding landscape and architecture.

items.question: How can I get started?
items.answer: Simply fill out our contact form or book a consultation via WhatsApp. We'll reach out to discuss your vision and schedule a discovery meeting.
